message:
Add partial-json to benchmarks, strip zimdjson StreamParser, add examples

- Benchmarks now compare VectorJSON vs partial-json vs JSON.parse
  across parse, end-to-end, and streaming scenarios
- Remove zimdjson StreamParser variant (unused, we use our own stream.zig)
- Add examples/ai-usage.ts showing MCP, OpenAI, Anthropic, Vercel AI SDK,
  and embeddings JSONL patterns
